acquisition method: the mass spectrometer operated in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode
collision energy: MS2 in ion trap (HCD 32% collision energy)
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos ETD (Thermo Fisher Scientific) mass spectrometer
labeling: the peptides were analyzed on a nano-LC 1200 system coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos ETD mass spectrometer.
